description: The histogram uses bins of wildly inconsistent widths (ranging from 5 hours to 25 hours) but displays them as equal-width bars, which is deeply misleading. Wider bins like "55-80" (spanning 25 hours) naturally capture more respondents and appear disproportionately tall compared to narrow bins like "10-15" (spanning only 5 hours), giving a distorted impression of how work hours are actually distributed. A reader would incorrectly conclude that the concentration of respondents in certain ranges is much higher or lower than it actually is.
